emergency_definition: Client: Sprinkler head leaking or burst, fire alarm going off, anything with active water or fire. That needs someone on the phone immediately.

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_message: Someone will call you back within 15 minutes.

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Collect name, number, and description. Confirm next-business-day followup.

call_transfer_rules.fail_action: Apologize and promise callback within 15 minutes

integration_constraints: Client: We use ServiceTrade for job management. But don't create sprinkler emergency jobs automatically - our dispatcher handles that manually.
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet after-hours. Ask purpose. Confirm emergency. Emergency: collect name/number/address → transfer to 214-555-0101. Fail: promise callback within 15 minutes. Non-emergency: collect details, confirm next-business-day followup.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. Ask purpose. Collect name and number. Route emergency to 214-555-0101, non-emergency to scheduling.
notes: Auto-extracted from transcript. Review emergency_definition for completeness.
